name: Corn Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cornstarch with 2 tablespoons water to make a smooth paste.
2. Add the mixture to the #2 can of cream style corn (up to 3 ears of fresh corn may be used when available).
3. Beat eggs and add 3 cups canned milk, 1 tablespoon sugar, and salt to taste.
4. Combine the egg mixture with the corn mixture.
5. Pour into a greased casserole or flat pan.
6. Bake in a slow oven (300 degrees) until the consistency of custard, about 50-60 minutes, when a knife inserted comes out clean.
